tasks.title: Opportunity Detail CRITICAL: Current page is fully hardcoded with SAMPLE_DEAL and SAMPLE_ACTIVITIES constants - zero API calls. Must: (1) Replace with api.opportunity.getById query (IFC-186 router already built with moveStage getHistory getProducts getPipeline endpoints). (2) Wire all 6 action buttons: Won/Lost to updateStage mutations with stage dialog Edit to navigate to edit form Clone to duplicate mutation Archive to set archived Delete to AlertDialog + delete mutation. (3) Add real activity timeline via ActivityFeed component (IFC-069). (4) Wire file section to real data. (5) Remove hardcoded SAMPLE_* constants. Cross-entity patterns from Lead 360 wiring (2026-03-04) should be followed.
tasks.description: Opportunity Detail CRITICAL: Current page is fully hardcoded with SAMPLE_DEAL and SAMPLE_ACTIVITIES constants - zero API calls. (2) Wire all 6 action buttons: Won/Lost to updateStage mutations with stage dialog Edit to navigate to edit form Clone to duplicate mutation Archive to set archived Delete to AlertDialog + delete mutation. (3) Add real activity timeline via ActivityFeed component (IFC-069). (4) Wire file section to real data. (5) Remove hardcoded SAMPLE_* constants. Cross-entity patterns from Lead 360 wiring (2026-03-04) should be followed.

tasks.title: Wire Unused Backend tRPC Endpoints - ~20 built but unused tRPC procedures. Lead: convertToDeal, getHotLeads, getReadyForQualification, bulkScore. Contact: getByEmail, linkToAccount, unlinkFromAccount, search, linkToLead, unlinkFromLead, getTimeline, logActivity. Opportunity: create, getById, getHistory, getProducts, getPipeline, stats. Account: create, update. Task: stats, assign, reschedule. Wire each to appropriate frontend UI or remove if not needed.

tasks.title: Lead Router Dead Code & Missing Events Cleanup. Fix 4 MEDIUM/LOW issues: (1) scoreWithAI notification variables at lines 517-527 set but never referenced - dead code [S10]. (2) LeadRoutedEvent defined in domain but never published by any procedure or service [S11]. (3) Only 3 of ~10 lead event types trigger notifications [W10]. (4) Lead notifications processed synchronously, not queued via BullMQ [W11]. Fix: Remove dead notification code, publish LeadRoutedEvent from routing logic, add notification handlers for remaining event types, enqueue via BullMQ.
tasks.description: Lead Router Dead Code & Missing Events Cleanup. Fix 4 MEDIUM/LOW issues: (1) scoreWithAI notification variables at lines 517-527 set but never referenced - dead code [S10]. (4) Lead notifications processed synchronously, not queued via BullMQ [W11]. Fix: Remove dead notification code, publish LeadRoutedEvent from routing logic, add notification handlers for remaining event types, enqueue via BullMQ.
tasks.summary: Dead code removed; LeadRoutedEvent published when lead routing occurs; >=8 event types have notification handlers; notifications enqueued via BullMQ; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Dead code removed; LeadRoutedEvent published when lead routing occurs; >=8 event types have notification handlers; notifications enqueued via BullMQ; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Lead Frontend Consistency - StatusBadge, Toast, window.prompt. Fix 3 MEDIUM issues: (1) window.prompt() used for note input at line 1951 - blocks UI, no multi-line, poor UX [F5]. Replace with Dialog/Sheet component. (2) Two different StatusBadge implementations - inline LeadStatusBadge vs shared component with different color schemes [F6]. Consolidate to shared component. (3) Two Toast patterns - sonner toast.success() vs shadcn useToast() used inconsistently across lead pages [F7]. Standardize to one pattern.

tasks.title: Dashboard Widget Real Data - ActiveLeads, TotalLeads, Analytics. Fix 3 HIGH/MEDIUM issues: (1) ActiveLeadsWidget fully hardcoded with static '1,240' and 'vs 1,100 last month' [F2]. (2) TotalLeadsWidget shows hardcoded '+12%' trend [W6]. (3) Analytics page for leads uses sample data arrays, no API queries [W7]. Fix: Wire ActiveLeadsWidget to lead.stats API, compute real trend from monthly comparison, wire Analytics page to real lead data endpoints.

tasks.title: Lead Activity Timeline Unification. Fix HIGH issue: logActivity creates LeadActivity records but these are NOT fed into the unified TimelineEvent system (IFC-069). Lead activities exist in a parallel silo [W1]. Also fix: No email-to-lead association - inbound emails not linked to leads by sender address [W2]. Fix: Create TimelineEvent adapter for LeadActivity, add email-to-lead matching in inbound parser, ensure lead detail 'All Sources' toggle shows unified data.
tasks.description: Lead Activity Timeline Unification. Fix HIGH issue: logActivity creates LeadActivity records but these are NOT fed into the unified TimelineEvent system (IFC-069). Lead activities exist in a parallel silo [W1]. Also fix: No email-to-lead association - inbound emails not linked to leads by sender address [W2]. Fix: Create TimelineEvent adapter for LeadActivity, add email-to-lead matching in inbound parser, ensure lead detail 'All Sources' toggle shows unified data.
tasks.summary: LeadActivity records appear in unified timeline; inbound emails matched to leads by sender; lead detail All Sources view shows real unified data; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: LeadActivity records appear in unified timeline; inbound emails matched to leads by sender; lead detail All Sources view shows real unified data; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: LeadActivity records appear in unified timeline; inbound emails matched to leads by sender; lead detail All Sources view shows real unified data; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Domain Model Lead 360 Alignment. Fix 4 HIGH issues: (1) Lead.toJSON() omits aiInsight, activities, notes, files, tasks relations - domain events carry incomplete snapshots [D1]. (2) qualify() only allows from NEW/CONTACTED but UI doesn't reflect this constraint [D2]. (3) LeadScoringChain throws unhandled error for unknown AI_PROVIDER [D3]. (4) AI scoring prompt only receives basic lead data, ignores activity count, engagement history, note count [D4]. Fix: Extend toJSON, expose allowed transitions, add provider fallback, enrich scoring prompt.
tasks.description: Domain Model Lead 360 Alignment. Fix 4 HIGH issues: (1) Lead.toJSON() omits aiInsight, activities, notes, files, tasks relations - domain events carry incomplete snapshots [D1]. (2) qualify() only allows from NEW/CONTACTED but UI doesn't reflect this constraint [D2]. (3) LeadScoringChain throws unhandled error for unknown AI_PROVIDER [D3]. (4) AI scoring prompt only receives basic lead data, ignores activity count, engagement history, note count [D4]. Fix: Extend toJSON, expose allowed transitions, add provider fallback, enrich scoring prompt.

tasks.title: Lead Edit Page Tests + E2E. Fix remaining test gaps: (1) Edit page onSuccess/onError callbacks untested, as any cast hides type errors [T9]. (2) No E2E tests for complete lead CRUD flow (create -> view -> edit -> delete) [T6]. Write: (1) Edit page component tests with mutation mocking. (2) Playwright E2E test for full lead lifecycle. E2E should cover: create lead with required fields, view on detail page, edit fields, archive/delete.

tasks.title: Contact Domain Model Fixes. (1) reconstitute() silently substitutes unknown@unknown.com for invalid emails — should Result.fail or throw (D-01). (2) mergeContacts no cross-tenant check — linkToLead correctly checks but merge doesn't (D-02). (3) No ContactDeletedEvent — deleteContact publishes no events, audit handler has mapping but event never emitted (D-04). (4) No ContactEmailChangedEvent — old email not captured in generic ContactUpdatedEvent (D-05). (5) Tags update always emits event without deep equality check (D-07). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §18.
tasks.description: Contact Domain Model Fixes. (1) reconstitute() silently substitutes unknown@unknown.com for invalid emails — should Result.fail or throw (D-01). (2) mergeContacts no cross-tenant check — linkToLead correctly checks but merge doesn't (D-02). (3) No ContactDeletedEvent — deleteContact publishes no events, audit handler has mapping but event never emitted (D-04). (4) No ContactEmailChangedEvent — old email not captured in generic ContactUpdatedEvent (D-05). (5) Tags update always emits event without deep equality check (D-07). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §18.
tasks.summary: reconstitute throws on invalid email; mergeContacts checks tenantId; ContactDeletedEvent and ContactEmailChangedEvent added; tags uses deep equality; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Account Activity Timeline — Replace Stub Data. AccountService.getAccountActivity() (lines 748-785) returns synthetic/stub activities with hardcoded descriptions and broken cursor pagination — not real Activity model records (F-13). Replace with real activity feed from ActivityFeed component or Activity model queries. Should use same pattern as Lead/Contact activity tabs. Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 6.

tasks.title: Deal Forecast Algorithm Fixes. (1) buildWinRateTrend hardcodes months ['May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct'] regardless of current date — semantically incorrect data (B-06, forecast-algorithm.ts:283). Fix to derive from actual 6-month window. (2) DEFAULT_STAGE_PROBABILITIES diverge: validators has NEEDS_ANALYSIS=30/PROPOSAL=70 while domain/service/router/forecast-algorithm uses 40/60 (B-08). Unify to single source of truth. (3) buildMonthlyRevenue uses locale-dependent toLocaleString for month names — breaks on non-en-US servers (B-15, forecast-algorithm.ts:269). (4) Forecast trend values hardcoded as 12 and 5 in forecast page (F-16, deals/forecast/page.tsx:709-710). Compute from API data. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 4, 6.
tasks.description: Deal Forecast Algorithm Fixes. Unify to single source of truth. (3) buildMonthlyRevenue uses locale-dependent toLocaleString for month names — breaks on non-en-US servers (B-15, forecast-algorithm.ts:269). (4) Forecast trend values hardcoded as 12 and 5 in forecast page (F-16, deals/forecast/page.tsx:709-710). Compute from API data. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 4, 6.

tasks.title: Deal Detail Page Tests + E2E. (1) Deal detail page (792 lines) has ZERO test coverage (T-01). (2) No E2E Playwright tests for /deals, /deals/[id], or /deals/forecast — only pipeline-settings has E2E (T-02). (3) No cross-tenant access attempt test in router tests (T-03). (4) Contract test missing NEEDS_ANALYSIS stage in test data (T-04). Depends on IFC-278 (real data) and IFC-280 (wired buttons). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 10.
